pageContext.name: Be@rbrick Ducky 100% & 400%
pageContext.description: 'To infinity and my foot!'  Sideshow and Medicom Toy are proud to present the Be@rbrick Ducky 100% & 400% Set!  Standing at approximately 2.75 and 11.02 inches tall, this adorable Be@rbrick set brings Toy Story 4's Ducky straight from their top prize spot, right to your arms! A perfect companion to none other than Bunny, be sure to bring these feisty little friends home and into your Disney collection today!
